raw.message: Vast worlds to explore, tons of weapons to master and unlimited ways to express yourself.

hook.summary: A mysterious figure asks 'What is Warframe?' followed by a dramatic eye close-up.
hook.visual_action: A man walks through a dark, blue-lit space, transitioning to an extreme close-up of his eye.

scene_flow: Mysterious narrator asks 'What is Warframe?' over a dark, cinematic close-up.
Rapid-fire montage of high-speed, acrobatic combat and futuristic abilities.
Display of various character classes and their unique combat styles against robotic foes.
The narrator commands 'Wake up, Tenno' as the scene returns to a close-up of an eye.
Final branding screen with the game title and a call to play for free.
audience_proxy: Hardcore gamers and sci-fi fans who enjoy fast-paced, high-fidelity action games.
